valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Sat 20 Jun 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Sun 21 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Low 250 miles northeast of Iceland 990, slow-moving, filling 995 by 0600 tomorrow. New high expected Dogger 1027 by same time
